summary: A joyful performance captured in a decent‑quality recording that lets the happy vibes shine through.
review: The reviewer is ecstatic about this June 21 1989 show, calling it a “GRATEful performance” and saying listeners will love the “happy daze tunez.” No specific complaints about the audio are made, only a reassurance not to downplay sound quality, suggesting the recording is at least listenable. Overall the vibe is overwhelmingly positive.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic 5‑star review; strong praise for the show but no concrete technical details, so rating leans high yet confidence is low due to limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer says not to downplay sound quality and offers no complaints, implying the recording is acceptable though details are vague.

show_quality.setlist_flow: General enthusiasm about the entire set; no specific comments on pacing or song order.
